analysis.autonomic_assessment: Your autonomic system shows concerning instability with HRV ranging from 40-79ms over the week, indicating significant sympathetic-parasympathetic imbalance. The clear correlation between poor sleep on 4/25 (6.9h) and HRV crash to 40ms suggests your POTS is highly sleep-dependent, though recovery to 68-79ms on subsequent days shows resilience.
analysis.thyroid_immune_signals: No temperature deviations suggest stable thyroid function with no active Hashimoto's flare. However, suboptimal deep sleep averaging 1.3 hours may compromise immune system repair and potentially allow autoimmune activity to progress unchecked.
analysis.vestibular_readiness: Readiness scores of 72 on 4/25 and 83 on 4/27 following autonomic instability suggest vestibular rehab should be scaled back on days when readiness drops below 80. The nervous system capacity for compensation appears good on higher-readiness days (89 on 4/24, 4/26, 4/28).
